svg.title: Godot DAP session lifecycle
svg.desc: An inferred lifecycle projects initialize, unresolved launch-or-attach, continue, breakpoint or pause, step, and termination operations. Q-010 remains visible on the launch-or-attach transition so the diagram does not choose process ownership.
